alternatives.name: Hardwired electronic alarm systems (door contacts wired to fire panel)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires mains cabling and conduit in retrofit buildings; electrician sign-off; EUR 150-300 labour/door on top of hardware; single cable-fault can drop a circuit; asbestos risk in pre-1980 buildings

alternatives.name: Battery-powered wireless alarm devices (Türwächter class, LoRaWAN door sensors)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Battery replacement cycles (1-3 yr); wireless range limits (~30-60 m); proprietary protocol friction (EasyWave != BACnet/KNX); higher unit cost than mechanical

alternatives.name: Mechanical-only door alarms (no monitoring, no wireless)
alternatives.tradeoffs: No event logging; no remote alerting; compliance evidence requires manual inspection; declining installed base; no portfolio visibility

alternatives.name: CCTV / video monitoring at exit points
alternatives.tradeoffs: No alarm-on-open; requires active human review; high infrastructure cost; GDPR data-retention complexity; no audit-grade timestamped event log

alternatives.name: Do nothing / manual inspection rounds [Status Quo]
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero P1 burden; FM inspection labor cost only (est. EUR 6-12/door/visit quarterly); compliance gap risk accepted
